title: Brunnian links and Kontsevich graph complex I
abstract: We construct a natural chain map from the Kontsevich graph complex to the rational singular chain complex of $B\mathrm{Diff}_\partial(D^{2k})$ when the dimension $2k$ is sufficiently large, generalizing Goussarov and Habiro's theories of surgery on 3-valent graphs in 3-manifolds. Our construction can be considered as a topological realization of the Kontsevich graph complex. We also give new constructions of elements in the rational homotopy groups of $B\mathrm{Diff}_\partial(D^{2k})$ which are determined by well-known cycles in the graph complex.
